message:
test(harness): add compliance test suite for MVCC, WAL, observability, and 2PC

Expand the test harness with comprehensive compliance tests targeting
recently implemented subsystems:

- bd_bca_1_phase5_compliance (+620 lines): extend phase 5 compliance
  tests with multi-statement query coverage and edge cases
- bd_bca_2_phase6_mvcc_ssi_compliance (23KB new): SSI isolation level
  compliance tests — write skew detection, phantom read prevention,
  and serialization anomaly validation
- bd_2fas_wal_checksum_chain_recovery (23KB new): WAL checksum chain
  recovery tests with proptest regression cases for corruption scenarios
- bd_3e5r_policy_controller_auto_tune (16KB new): policy controller
  auto-tuning compliance — adaptive threshold adjustment validation
- bd_3go_11_observability_policy_controller (17KB new): observability
  integration tests for the policy controller subsystem
- bd_3q1g_observability_evidence_ledger (28KB new): evidence ledger
  compliance tests for audit trail completeness and ordering
- bd_d2m7_begin_concurrent_cross_db_2pc (18KB new): cross-database
  two-phase commit compliance under BEGIN CONCURRENT semantics
- trace_monoid (+50 lines): add trace monoid algebraic property tests
- eprocess (+5 lines): minor harness process management additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 3428a0d32aee2b4e58909f286504fedbf6fa1ada610ed2d2236cdd269e92bee3 # shrinks to missing_index = 2
